why_this_action.summary: Detected that the comparison queue only yielded follow-through and blocked the run from counting prepared-only comparison churn as fresh execution. Reused the already-current comparison handoff packet because live PR submission is blocked here and that packet is still inside its active review window. Scheduled an automatic post-hold marketer rerun at the updated short-window release time.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg movement is the primary success gate
outreach-log.md: avoid duplicate submission work and repeated HN/Lobsters-only handoff
market_intelligence_latest.json: reusable competitor comparisons and positioning truths
outcome_capability_runner: force non-Reddit executable lane with direct Codeberg adoption linkage
